images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunning Japanese idol/influencer posed as an elegant ballet dancer, flawless skin with visible pores, expressive large eyes, cute yet seductive face, fit and curvy silhouette—slim waist, ample bust—her straight black silky hair catching the morning mist. She sports a form‑fitting beige trench coat over a delicate white lace leotard, the coat’s flared back fluttering like a veil, the subtle sheen accentuating her curves. Standing barefoot on a dirt path amid a vast rice‑paddy field, she is bathed in soft diffused morning light that evokes a melancholic, deep atmosphere. Eye‑level, she lightly places a slender finger on her lips, a coy, intimate gesture balancing ballet poise with quiet allure. Shot on a Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field produces creamy bokeh, ray‑traced global illumination adds realism, and a film‑grain overlay gives a nostalgic, viral‑ready finish.8k photo, Large breasts
